non_claim_lock: Negative control validation is repository-bound and does not prove code correctness, truth, AGI, consciousness, production readiness, security, external validation, or real-world correctness.
promotion_rule: Promotion is admissible only when positive controls pass, negative controls reject correctly, false promote attempts are blocked, downgrade controls preserve downgrade status, and observe-only controls remain non-promotional.
purpose: Reject false promote states and preserve downgrade/observe-only cases before memory promotion.
title: CMS-SA v0.3b4 - Negative Control and Downgrade Harness
